hero.subtitle: GradeOwl helps teachers grade subjective exams in a fraction of the time — with rubric-based AI evaluation for CBSE, ICSE, and State Board schools.
hero.img_alt: Indian teacher using smartphone to scan student answer sheets with GradeOwl

features.heading: Everything you need to grade smarter
features.subheading: From question paper to final marks — GradeOwl handles the heavy lifting so you can focus on teaching.
features.rubric_desc: Upload your answer key photo and get a detailed marking rubric in seconds. AI understands your expected answers and creates fair, consistent criteria.
features.studentid_desc: Scan the cover page and GradeOwl automatically extracts the student's name and roll number. No more typing 60 names manually.
features.grading_desc: Every answer is evaluated against your rubric — consistently across all copies. AI provides detailed feedback with marks for each criterion.
features.cluster_desc: Similar answers are grouped together for batch review. Approve or adjust marks for entire clusters at once — saving hours of repetitive checking.

analytics.step1_desc: Take photos of your question paper and model answers. GradeOwl generates a detailed rubric automatically.
analytics.step2_desc: Use your phone camera to scan each student's copy. AI reads the cover page and identifies the student automatically.
analytics.step3_desc: AI grades every answer against your rubric. Review similar answers in clusters, make adjustments, and export the final marks.

footer.tagline: Making quality education affordable for every Indian school.

home.boards_heading: Works with all major Indian boards
home.quote: "Teachers spend 8-12 hours every week checking copies by hand. GradeOwl is built to give them that time back."
home.cta_subheading: Be among the first teachers to transform how they grade subjective exams.
home.seo_desc: AI grading CBSE answer sheets — rubric-based evaluation for Indian schools. GradeOwl reduces copy-checking time so teachers escape grading burnout.

gradeowl.subtitle: Upload your question paper, scan student answer sheets with your phone, and let AI grade every copy using your rubric. From Hindi essays to Science diagrams.
gradeowl.img_alt: GradeOwl grading workflow — scan answer sheets, AI processes with rubric, get graded results
gradeowl.walkthrough_heading: From question paper to final marks
gradeowl.walkthrough_subheading: The entire grading workflow in 5 simple steps
gradeowl.step1_desc: Take photos of your question paper and model answer sheet. GradeOwl reads handwritten and printed text in Hindi, English, or mixed.
gradeowl.step2_desc: GradeOwl creates a detailed marking rubric based on your answer key — with criteria, marks allocation, and acceptable variations. Review and adjust as needed.
gradeowl.step3_desc: Open the GradeOwl app on your phone and scan each student's copy. The cover page is read automatically to extract name and roll number — no typing needed.
gradeowl.step4_desc: Each answer is evaluated against your rubric with detailed feedback. Consistent scoring across all 60+ copies — no fatigue bias.
gradeowl.step5_desc: Similar answers are grouped into clusters for batch review. Approve or adjust marks for entire groups at once, then export final marks as CSV.
gradeowl.handwritten_desc: Hindi, English, or mixed-language handwriting. Diagrams and equations too.
gradeowl.boards_desc: CBSE, ICSE, Karnataka State Board, and all other state boards. Any subject.
gradeowl.phone_desc: No scanner, no special hardware. Just your Android or iOS phone camera.
gradeowl.faq1_q: How accurate is the AI grading?
gradeowl.faq1_a: GradeOwl uses rubric-based evaluation with Gemini Vision AI. It scores each answer criterion-by-criterion, just like a careful teacher would. You always have final say — review and adjust any grade.
gradeowl.faq2_q: Does it work with Hindi medium answer sheets?
gradeowl.faq2_a: Yes! GradeOwl can read handwritten Hindi, English, and mixed-language answers. It understands Devanagari script and transliterated text.
gradeowl.faq3_q: Do I need internet while scanning?
gradeowl.faq3_a: You need internet to submit for grading, but the app works offline for scanning. Photos are queued and uploaded when you're back online.
gradeowl.faq4_q: How many answer sheets can I grade at once?
gradeowl.faq4_a: There's no limit. Teachers typically grade 40-80 copies per exam. GradeOwl handles them all with consistent rubric-based evaluation.
gradeowl.faq5_q: Can I modify the AI-generated rubric?
gradeowl.faq5_a: Absolutely. The AI generates a starting rubric from your answer key, but you have full control to edit criteria, adjust marks, and add your own standards.
gradeowl.faq6_q: What subjects does it work with?
gradeowl.faq6_a: Any subject with subjective (written) answers — Science, Social Studies, Hindi, English, History, Geography, and more. Works with short answers, long answers, and essays.
gradeowl.bottom_subtitle: Join the early access program and be among the first teachers to use GradeOwl.
gradeowl.seo_desc: GradeOwl — AI grading CBSE, ICSE & State Board schools. Automated answer checking India with rubric-based evaluation for handwritten Hindi & English.
gradeowl.seo_keywords: gradeowl, ai grading, subjective exam grading, answer sheet checking, cbse grading, icse grading, copy checking ai, ai grading cbse, automated answer checking india, edtech tools for teachers india, rubric based grading india, teacher burnout india, manual vs ai grading

schools.subtitle: Give your teachers superpowers with GradeOwl. Grade subjective exams in minutes, not hours. Built for CBSE, ICSE, and State Board schools.
schools.img_alt: Indian teacher at desk with graded papers and analytics on laptop
schools.time_desc: Teachers spend 8-12 hours per week checking copies by hand. GradeOwl's AI-assisted rubric-based grading is designed to dramatically reduce that.
schools.fair_desc: Every student's answer is evaluated against the same rubric. No fatigue bias, no inconsistency across 60+ copies.
schools.analytics_desc: See which questions students struggled with most. Export marks as CSV. Identify topic-wise gaps across the class.
schools.love_1: Grades 60+ answer sheets in under 2 hours
schools.love_2: Works with handwritten Hindi and English answers
schools.love_3: AI reads student name and roll number from cover page
schools.love_4: Detailed rubric-based feedback for every answer
schools.love_5: Cluster review for batch verification of similar answers
schools.love_6: Export marks as CSV for school records
schools.seo_desc: School exam management tools for India. GradeOwl brings automated answer checking and rubric-based AI grading to CBSE, ICSE, and State Board schools.

vision.para1: India has 1.5 million schools and 9.6 million teachers — yet most still grade subjective exams by hand. We believe every teacher deserves an AI assistant that understands their rubric, reads their students' handwriting, and grades with the care they would.
vision.para2_1: NeuraConcept is building the infrastructure for
vision.para2_2: . Starting with GradeOwl — an AI teaching assistant that begins with grading and grows into a full personalized learning companion.
vision.img_alt: Indian students and teacher connected by a network of knowledge, representing education transformation
vision.understanding_desc: We prioritize deep conceptual linkage over rote recall. True learning happens when dots connect.
vision.precision_desc: No more wasted time studying what you already know. We guide you to the exact frontier of your knowledge.
vision.access_desc: Quality personal tutoring is a luxury in India. We're using AI to make expert-level assessment affordable for every school — from Bangalore to Bhopal.
vision.seo_desc: We are building the infrastructure for affordable, quality education at scale in India. Starting with GradeOwl.

tech.subtitle: Our technology combines the interpretive power of symbolic AI with the learning capabilities of neural networks to create a comprehensive Knowledge Graph of student understanding.
tech.kg_desc: Unlike traditional LMS which treats content as flat files, we map every concept, formula, and rule into an interconnected graph. This allows us to understand prerequisites, dependencies, and related concepts automatically.
tech.cognitive_desc: Our pipeline processes NCERT textbooks through six stages — from PDF parsing to concept extraction, enrichment, deduplication, and prerequisite discovery. The result is a structured graph of every concept across Classes 6-8, with edges showing what a student needs to know before learning something new.
tech.vector_desc: Reads handwritten Hindi, English, and mixed-language answer sheets using Gemini Vision AI and Sarvam — no typed input needed.
tech.irt_desc: Vector embeddings group similar student answers together, so teachers can review and adjust marks for entire clusters at once.
tech.privacy_desc: Dual embeddings — semantic and prerequisite — find concept dependencies across subjects and grades automatically.
tech.seo_desc: Neuro-symbolic AI for Indian schools — knowledge graphs, multi-language OCR, and rubric-based evaluation. Edtech AI India 2026 from NeuraConcept.

pricing.starter_best_for: Best for schools with up to 10 teachers
pricing.faq1_a: We're in early access. Schools joining now get free access and will be offered preferential rates when paid plans launch.
pricing.faq2_a: No. Our pricing is per-school, not per-teacher. All teachers in your school can use GradeOwl.
pricing.faq3_a: Yes! Early access is completely free. No credit card required.
pricing.faq4_q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq4_a: We'll accept UPI, bank transfer, and card payments. Invoicing available for schools.

about.subtitle: Building AI education infrastructure to make quality education affordable for every Indian school.
about.founder_bio: Ex-Google Search engineer who shipped widgets impacting 340K+ users on Google Discover. BITS Pilani CS graduate. Previously worked on graph databases at Vaticle (TypeDB) — directly relevant to NeuraConcept's knowledge graph technology. Built NeuraConcept to make quality education affordable for every Indian school.
about.building_subtitle: Three products that work together to transform how Indian schools teach and assess.
about.product_gradeowl_desc: AI-powered grading for subjective exams. Rubric-based evaluation for CBSE, ICSE, and State Board schools — designed to give teachers their time back.
about.product_kg_desc: Mapping the entire Indian curriculum into an interconnected concept graph. Every topic, prerequisite, and relationship — structured for machine understanding.
about.product_personalized_desc: Using grading data and knowledge graphs to build a "digital twin" of each student's understanding. Precision guidance to exactly where they need help.
